summary: A Go-based monolithic tool featuring a test runner, MCP integration, and Goss migration capabilities, currently undergoing heavy automated test generation.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated extra test files indicates potential test fragmentation or flakiness
Untracked and unstaged files in git status suggest incomplete commits or workflow automation artifacts
Heavy reliance on isolated extra test directories may lead to test suite maintenance burden
suggestions: Consolidate the numerous agent-generated extra test files into the standard test suites to reduce duplication
Clean up untracked files and establish a clear .gitignore policy for GOrchestra agent artifacts
Focus on the core runner and MCP handler logic as they represent the primary business value
